data.title: What's Going On With NuZee Stock Thursday?
data.description: NuZee stock is trading higher on Thursday after the company announced it moved its U.S. operations from California to Florida and established offices around the globe.

data.title: Alnylam Stock Up on Cardiomyopathy Drug Regulatory Filing in the EU
data.description: Alnylam Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: ALNY) announced that it has submitted a Type II Variation to the European Medicines Agency for vutrisiran, an investigational RNAi therapeutic being developed to treat ATTR amyloidosis with cardiomyopathy (ATTR-CM).

data.title: Revolutionizing Cannabis Edibles: Ascend's New THC-Cannabinoid Blends Now Available In This East Coast Market
data.description: Ascend Wellness announced on Thursday the launch of its new edibles-only brand, Effin'. Effin' products are formulated combinations of THC and minor cannabinoids like THCV, CBN, CBG, and CBD.Effin' initially debuted in Massachusetts and Illinois in early October, with a New Jersey launch planned for the end of the month.

data.title: Lyft's Latest Move: Cash App Partnership Offers Easier Payments For Gen Z And Millennials
data.description: Lyft partners with Cash App to offer a seamless payment option for digital-first consumers.

data.title: JPMorgan Launches Private Client Tier To Attract 'Affluent' Customers
data.description: JPMorgan Chase & Co. is launching a new initiative, called J.P. Morgan Private Client, to attract and serve affluent clients. Here's what to know.
